		}
	}
	else_if = {
		limit = { var:dm_reform_target = flag:dm_reform_budget_15_10_75 }
		story_owner = {
			add_realm_law = budget_allocation_salary_15
			add_realm_law = budget_allocation_ministry_10
			add_realm_law = budget_allocation_military_75

}

dm_reform_capture_current_level_effect = {
	# ROOT: reform story
	set_variable = { name = dm_reform_current_level value = 0 }
	if = {
		limit = { var:dm_reform_target = flag:top_liege_redirected_to_border_wars_law }
		if = {
			limit = { story_owner = { has_realm_law = top_liege_redirected_to_border_wars_law } }
			set_variable = { name = dm_reform_current_level value = -3 }
		}
		if = {
			limit = { story_owner = { has_realm_law = top_liege_not_redirected_to_border_wars_law } }
			set_variable = { name = dm_reform_current_level value = 3 }
		}
	}
	else_if = {
		limit = { var:dm_reform_target = flag:top_liege_not_redirected_to_border_wars_law }
		if = {
			limit = { story_owner = { has_realm_law = top_liege_redirected_to_border_wars_law } }
			set_variable = { name = dm_reform_current_level value = -3 }
		}
		if = {
			limit = { story_owner = { has_realm_law = top_liege_not_redirected_to_border_wars_law } }
			set_variable = { name = dm_reform_current_level value = 3 }
		}
	}
	else_if = {
		limit = { var:dm_reform_target = flag:budget_allocation_military_0 }
		if = {
			limit = { story_owner = { has_realm_law = budget_allocation_military_0 } }
			set_variable = { name = dm_reform_current_level value = -3 }
		}
		if = {
			limit = { story_owner = { has_realm_law = budget_allocation_military_5 } }
			set_variable = { name = dm_reform_current_level value = -3 }
		}
		if = {
			limit = { story_owner = { has_realm_law = budget_allocation_military_10 } }
			set_variable = { name = dm_reform_current_level value = -2 }
		}
		if = {
			limit = { story_owner = { has_realm_law = budget_allocation_military_15 } }
			set_variable = { name = dm_reform_current_level value = -2 }
		}
		if = {
			limit = { story_owner = { has_realm_law = budget_allocation_military_20 } }
			set_variable = { name = dm_reform_current_level value = -2 }
		}
		if = {
			limit = { story_owner = { has_realm_law = budget_allocation_military_25 } }
			set_variable = { name = dm_reform_current_level value = -2 }
		}
		if = {
			limit = { story_owner = { has_realm_law = budget_allocation_military_30 } }
			set_variable = { name = dm_reform_current_level value = -1 }
		}
		if = {
			limit = { story_owner = { has_realm_law = budget_allocation_military_35 } }
			set_variable = { name = dm_reform_current_level value = -1 }
		}
		if = {
			limit = { story_owner = { has_realm_law = budget_allocation_military_40 } }
			set_variable = { name = dm_reform_current_level value = -1 }
		}
		if = {
			limit = { story_owner = { has_realm_law = budget_allocation_military_45 } }
			set_variable = { name = dm_reform_current_level value = 0 }
		}
		if = {
			limit = { story_owner = { has_realm_law = budget_allocation_military_50 } }
			set_variable = { name = dm_reform_current_level value = 0 }
		}
		if = {
			limit = { story_owner = { has_realm_law = budget_allocation_military_55 } }
			set_variable = { name = dm_reform_current_level value = 0 }
		}
		if = {
			limit = { story_owner = { has_realm_law = budget_allocation_military_60 } }
			set_variable = { name = dm_reform_current_level value = 1 }
		}
		if = {
			limit = { story_owner = { has_realm_law = budget_allocation_military_65 } }
			set_variable = { name = dm_reform_current_level value = 1 }
		}
		if = {
			limit = { story_owner = { has_realm_law = budget_allocation_military_70 } }
			set_variable = { name = dm_reform_current_level value = 1 }
		}
		if = {
			limit = { story_owner = { has_realm_law = budget_allocation_military_75 } }
			set_variable = { name = dm_reform_current_level value = 2 }
		}
		if = {
			limit = { story_owner = { has_realm_law = budget_allocation_military_80 } }
			set_variable = { name = dm_reform_current_level value = 2 }
		}
		if = {
			limit = { story_owner = { has_realm_law = budget_allocation_military_85 } }
			set_variable = { name = dm_reform_current_level value = 2 }
		}
		if = {
			limit = { story_owner = { has_realm_law = budget_allocation_military_90 } }
			set_variable = { name = dm_reform_current_level value = 2 }
		}
		if = {
			limit = { story_owner = { has_realm_law = budget_allocation_military_95 } }
			set_variable = { name = dm_reform_current_level value = 3 }
		}
		if = {
			limit = { story_owner = { has_realm_law = budget_allocation_military_100 } }
			set_variable = { name = dm_reform_current_level value = 3 }
		}
	}
	else_if = {
		limit = { var:dm_reform_target = flag:budget_allocation_military_5 }
		if = {
			limit = { story_owner = { has_realm_law = budget_allocation_military_0 } }
			set_variable = { name = dm_reform_current_level value = -3 }
		}
		if = {
			limit = { story_owner = { has_realm_law = budget_allocation_military_5 } }
			set_variable = { name = dm_reform_current_level value = -3 }
		}
		if = {
			limit = { story_owner = { has_realm_law = budget_allocation_military_10 } }
			set_variable = { name = dm_reform_current_level value = -2 }
		}
		if = {
			limit = { story_owner = { has_realm_law = budget_allocation_military_15 } }
			set_variable = { name = dm_reform_current_level value = -2 }
		}
		if = {
			limit = { story_owner = { has_realm_law = budget_allocation_military_20 } }
			set_variable = { name = dm_reform_current_level value = -2 }
		}
		if = {
			limit = { story_owner = { has_realm_law = budget_allocation_military_25 } }
			set_variable = { name = dm_reform_current_level value = -2 }
		}
		if = {
			limit = { story_owner = { has_realm_law = budget_allocation_military_30 } }
			set_variable = { name = dm_reform_current_level value = -1 }
		}
		if = {
			limit = { story_owner = { has_realm_law = budget_allocation_military_35 } }
			set_variable = { name = dm_reform_current_level value = -1 }
		}
		if = {
			limit = { story_owner = { has_realm_law = budget_allocation_military_40 } }
			set_variable = { name = dm_reform_current_level value = -1 }
		}
		if = {
			limit = { story_owner = { has_realm_law = budget_allocation_military_45 } }
			set_variable = { name = dm_reform_current_level value = 0 }
		}
		if = {
			limit = { story_owner = { has_realm_law = budget_allocation_military_50 } }
			set_variable = { name = dm_reform_current_level value = 0 }
		}
		if = {
			limit = { story_owner = { has_realm_law = budget_allocation_military_55 } }
			set_variable = { name = dm_reform_current_level value = 0 }
		}
		if = {
			limit = { story_owner = { has_realm_law = budget_allocation_military_60 } }
			set_variable = { name = dm_reform_current_level value = 1 }
		}
		if = {
			limit = { story_owner = { has_realm_law = budget_allocation_military_65 } }
			set_variable = { name = dm_reform_current_level value = 1 }
		}
		if = {
			limit = { story_owner = { has_realm_law = budget_allocation_military_70 } }
			set_variable = { name = dm_reform_current_level value = 1 }
		}
		if = {
			limit = { story_owner = { has_realm_law = budget_allocation_military_75 } }
			set_variable = { name = dm_reform_current_level value = 2 }
		}
		if = {
			limit = { story_owner = { has_realm_law = budget_allocation_military_80 } }
			set_variable = { name = dm_reform_current_level value = 2 }
		}

		}
		if = {
			limit = { story_owner = { has_realm_law = isolation_law } }
			set_variable = { name = dm_reform_current_level value = -1 }
		}
		if = {
			limit = { story_owner = { has_realm_law = imperial_expansion_law } }
			set_variable = { name = dm_reform_current_level value = 1 }
		}
		if = {
			limit = { story_owner = { has_realm_law = manor_reform_law } }
			set_variable = { name = dm_reform_current_level value = 2 }
		}
		if = {
			limit = { story_owner = { has_realm_law = bandit_crackdown_law } }
			set_variable = { name = dm_reform_current_level value = 3 }
		}
	}
	else_if = {
		limit = { var:dm_reform_target = flag:isolation_law }
		if = {
			limit = { story_owner = { has_realm_law = defense_mobilization_law } }
			set_variable = { name = dm_reform_current_level value = -3 }
		}
		if = {

			set_variable = { name = dm_reform_current_level value = -2 }
		}

			set_variable = { name = dm_reform_current_level value = -1 }
		}
		if = {
			limit = { story_owner = { has_realm_law = law_vassal_war_policy_prohibit_all_wars } }
			set_variable = { name = dm_reform_current_level value = 1 }

		if = {

		}

			limit = { story_owner = { has_realm_law = saas_limited_stipend_law } }
			set_variable = { name = dm_reform_current_level value = -2 }
		}
		if = {
			limit = { story_owner = { has_realm_law = saas_normal_stipend_law } }
			set_variable = { name = dm_reform_current_level value = 0 }
		}
		if = {
			limit = { story_owner = { has_realm_law = saas_large_stipend_law } }
			set_variable = { name = dm_reform_current_level value = 2 }
		}
		if = {
			limit = { story_owner = { has_realm_law = saas_double_stipend_law } }
			set_variable = { name = dm_reform_current_level value = 3 }
		}
	}
	else_if = {
		limit = { var:dm_reform_target = flag:saas_large_stipend_law }
		if = {
			limit = { story_owner = { has_realm_law = saas_no_stipend_law } }

			limit = { story_owner = { has_realm_law = clan_harmonious_partition_succession_law } }
			set_variable = { name = dm_reform_current_level value = 0 }
		}
		if = {
			limit = { story_owner = { has_realm_law = herder_succession_law } }
			set_variable = { name = dm_reform_current_level value = 0 }
		}

			set_variable = { name = dm_reform_current_level value = -1 }
		}

			set_variable = { name = dm_reform_current_level value = -1 }
		}

			limit = { story_owner = { has_realm_law = feudal_governor_promotion_succession_law } }
			set_variable = { name = dm_reform_current_level value = 2 }
		}

			set_variable = { name = dm_reform_current_level value = 1 }
		}
		if = {
			limit = { story_owner = { has_realm_law = meritocratic_military_appointment_succession_law } }
			set_variable = { name = dm_reform_current_level value = 2 }
		}
		if = {
			limit = { story_owner = { has_realm_law = meritocratic_regency_succession_law } }

		if = {
			limit = { story_owner = { has_realm_law = japanese_regency_succession_law } }
			set_variable = { name = dm_reform_current_level value = 1 }
		}
		if = {
			limit = { story_owner = { has_realm_law = japanese_appointment_succession_law } }
			set_variable = { name = dm_reform_current_level value = 1 }
		}
		if = {
			limit = { story_owner = { has_realm_law = japanese_military_appointment_succession_law } }
			set_variable = { name = dm_reform_current_level value = 1 }
		}
		if = {
			limit = { story_owner = { has_realm_law = mandala_succession_law } }
			set_variable = { name = dm_reform_current_level value = 1 }
		}
		if = {
			limit = { story_owner = { has_realm_law = meritocratic_appointment_succession_law } }
			set_variable = { name = dm_reform_current_level value = 1 }
		}
		if = {
			limit = { story_owner = { has_realm_law = meritocratic_military_appointment_succession_law } }
			set_variable = { name = dm_reform_current_level value = 2 }
		}
		if = {
			limit = { story_owner = { has_realm_law = meritocratic_regency_succession_law } }
			set_variable = { name = dm_reform_current_level value = 2 }
		}
		if = {
			limit = { story_owner = { has_realm_law = feudal_governor_appointment_succession_law } }
			set_variable = { name = dm_reform_current_level value = 2 }
		}
		if = {
			limit = { story_owner = { has_realm_law = feudal_governor_promotion_succession_law } }
			set_variable = { name = dm_reform_current_level value = 2 }
		}
	}
	else_if = {
		limit = { var:dm_reform_target = flag:feudal_governor_promotion_succession_law }
		if = {
			limit = { story_owner = { has_realm_law = confederate_partition_succession_law } }
			set_variable = { name = dm_reform_current_level value = -3 }
		}
		if = {
			limit = { story_owner = { has_realm_law = partition_succession_law } }
			set_variable = { name = dm_reform_current_level value = -3 }
		}
		if = {
			limit = { story_owner = { has_realm_law = high_partition_succession_law } }
			set_variable = { name = dm_reform_current_level value = -3 }
		}
		if = {
			limit = { story_owner = { has_realm_law = single_heir_succession_law } }
			set_variable = { name = dm_reform_current_level value = -2 }
		}
		if = {
			limit = { story_owner = { has_realm_law = single_heir_succession_kurultai_law } }
			set_variable = { name = dm_reform_current_level value = -2 }
		}
		if = {
			limit = { story_owner = { has_realm_law = single_heir_succession_law_youngest } }
			set_variable = { name = dm_reform_current_level value = -2 }
		}
		if = {
			limit = { story_owner = { has_realm_law = single_heir_dynasty_house } }
			set_variable = { name = dm_reform_current_level value = -2 }
		}
		if = {
			limit = { story_owner = { has_realm_law = acclamation_succession_law } }
			set_variable = { name = dm_reform_current_level value = -2 }
		}
		if = {
			limit = { story_owner = { has_realm_law = appointment_succession_law } }
			set_variable = { name = dm_reform_current_level value = -2 }
		}
		if = {
			limit = { story_owner = { has_realm_law = landless_adventurer_succession_law } }
			set_variable = { name = dm_reform_current_level value = -1 }
		}
		if = {
			limit = { story_owner = { has_realm_law = bishop_theocratic_succession_law } }
			set_variable = { name = dm_reform_current_level value = -1 }
		}
		if = {
			limit = { story_owner = { has_realm_law = holy_order_succession_law } }
			set_variable = { name = dm_reform_current_level value = -1 }
		}
		if = {
			limit = { story_owner = { has_realm_law = mercenary_company_succession_law } }
			set_variable = { name = dm_reform_current_level value = -1 }
		}
		if = {
			limit = { story_owner = { has_realm_law = city_succession_law } }
			set_variable = { name = dm_reform_current_level value = -1 }
		}
		if = {
			limit = { story_owner = { has_realm_law = clan_antagonistic_partition_succession_law } }
			set_variable = { name = dm_reform_current_level value = -1 }
		}
		if = {
			limit = { story_owner = { has_realm_law = clan_competitive_partition_succession_law } }
			set_variable = { name = dm_reform_current_level value = 0 }
		}
		if = {
			limit = { story_owner = { has_realm_law = clan_impassive_partition_succession_law } }
			set_variable = { name = dm_reform_current_level value = 0 }
		}
		if = {
			limit = { story_owner = { has_realm_law = clan_friendly_partition_succession_law } }
			set_variable = { name = dm_reform_current_level value = 0 }
		}
		if = {
			limit = { story_owner = { has_realm_law = clan_harmonious_partition_succession_law } }
			set_variable = { name = dm_reform_current_level value = 0 }
		}
		if = {
			limit = { story_owner = { has_realm_law = herder_succession_law } }
			set_variable = { name = dm_reform_current_level value = 0 }
		}
		if = {
			limit = { story_owner = { has_realm_law = celestial_appointment_succession_law } }
			set_variable = { name = dm_reform_current_level value = 0 }
		}
		if = {
			limit = { story_owner = { has_realm_law = celestial_military_appointment_succession_law } }
			set_variable = { name = dm_reform_current_level value = 1 }
		}
		if = {
			limit = { story_owner = { has_realm_law = japanese_regency_succession_law } }
			set_variable = { name = dm_reform_current_level value = 1 }
		}
		if = {
			limit = { story_owner = { has_realm_law = japanese_appointment_succession_law } }
			set_variable = { name = dm_reform_current_level value = 1 }
		}
		if = {
			limit = { story_owner = { has_realm_law = japanese_military_appointment_succession_law } }
			set_variable = { name = dm_reform_current_level value = 1 }
		}
		if = {
			limit = { story_owner = { has_realm_law = mandala_succession_law } }
			set_variable = { name = dm_reform_current_level value = 1 }
		}
		if = {
			limit = { story_owner = { has_realm_law = meritocratic_appointment_succession_law } }
			set_variable = { name = dm_reform_current_level value = 1 }
		}
		if = {
			limit = { story_owner = { has_realm_law = meritocratic_military_appointment_succession_law } }
			set_variable = { name = dm_reform_current_level value = 2 }
		}
		if = {
			limit = { story_owner = { has_realm_law = meritocratic_regency_succession_law } }
			set_variable = { name = dm_reform_current_level value = 2 }
		}
		if = {
			limit = { story_owner = { has_realm_law = feudal_governor_appointment_succession_law } }
			set_variable = { name = dm_reform_current_level value = 2 }
		}
		if = {
			limit = { story_owner = { has_realm_law = feudal_governor_promotion_succession_law } }
			set_variable = { name = dm_reform_current_level value = 2 }
		}
	}
	else_if = {
		limit = { var:dm_reform_target = flag:tribal_authority_0 }
		if = {
			limit = { story_owner = { has_realm_law = tribal_authority_0 } }
			set_variable = { name = dm_reform_current_level value = -3 }
		}
		if = {
			limit = { story_owner = { has_realm_law = tribal_authority_1 } }
			set_variable = { name = dm_reform_current_level value = -1 }
		}
		if = {
			limit = { story_owner = { has_realm_law = tribal_authority_2 } }
			set_variable = { name = dm_reform_current_level value = 1 }
		}
		if = {
			limit = { story_owner = { has_realm_law = tribal_authority_3 } }
			set_variable = { name = dm_reform_current_level value = 3 }
		}
	}
	else_if = {
		limit = { var:dm_reform_target = flag:tribal_authority_1 }
		if = {
			limit = { story_owner = { has_realm_law = tribal_authority_0 } }
			set_variable = { name = dm_reform_current_level value = -3 }
		}
		if = {
			limit = { story_owner = { has_realm_law = tribal_authority_1 } }
			set_variable = { name = dm_reform_current_level value = -1 }
		}
		if = {
			limit = { story_owner = { has_realm_law = tribal_authority_2 } }
			set_variable = { name = dm_reform_current_level value = 1 }
		}
		if = {
			limit = { story_owner = { has_realm_law = tribal_authority_3 } }
			set_variable = { name = dm_reform_current_level value = 3 }
		}
	}
	else_if = {
		limit = { var:dm_reform_target = flag:tribal_authority_2 }
		if = {
			limit = { story_owner = { has_realm_law = tribal_authority_0 } }
			set_variable = { name = dm_reform_current_level value = -3 }
		}
		if = {
			limit = { story_owner = { has_realm_law = tribal_authority_1 } }
			set_variable = { name = dm_reform_current_level value = -1 }
		}
		if = {
			limit = { story_owner = { has_realm_law = tribal_authority_2 } }
			set_variable = { name = dm_reform_current_level value = 1 }
		}
		if = {
			limit = { story_owner = { has_realm_law = tribal_authority_3 } }
			set_variable = { name = dm_reform_current_level value = 3 }
		}
	}
	else_if = {
		limit = { var:dm_reform_target = flag:tribal_authority_3 }
		if = {
			limit = { story_owner = { has_realm_law = tribal_authority_0 } }
			set_variable = { name = dm_reform_current_level value = -3 }
		}
		if = {
			limit = { story_owner = { has_realm_law = tribal_authority_1 } }
			set_variable = { name = dm_reform_current_level value = -1 }
		}
		if = {
			limit = { story_owner = { has_realm_law = tribal_authority_2 } }
			set_variable = { name = dm_reform_current_level value = 1 }
		}
		if = {
			limit = { story_owner = { has_realm_law = tribal_authority_3 } }
			set_variable = { name = dm_reform_current_level value = 3 }
		}
	}
	set_variable = {
		name = dm_reform_interest_delta
		value = var:dm_reform_target_level
	}
	change_variable = {
		name = dm_reform_interest_delta
		subtract = var:dm_reform_current_level
	}
}
